content.text: How do I retrieve all submission data for a specific assignment within a known course using the Canvas API?

This function constructs the precise URL needed to target assignments submissions, then uses an internal helper method to handle any necessary pagination across multiple API responses.

```python
def get_submissions_by_course_and_assignment(
            self, course_id, assignment_id, params={}):
        """
        https://canvas.instructure.com/doc/api/submissions.html#method.submissions_api.index
        """
        url = COURSES_API.format(course_id)
        url += "/assignments/{}/submissions".format(assignment_id)

        submissions = []
        for data in self._get_paged_resource(url, params=params):
            submissions.append(Submission(data=data))
        return submissions
```

The core logic relies on `self._get_paged_resource` which ensures that if there are hundreds of submissions, they are all fetched correctly and wrapped in a Submission object.
Will this function still work correctly if I only want to retrieve submissions from a specific date range?
Currently, it fetches *all* submissions. To filter by dates, you would need to pass the start and end date parameters into the `params` dictionary when calling the method.
